## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Bradley Herman and growthx.ai, discussing backgrounds, company vision, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bradley has extensive experience as a technical co-founder and engineer, with a strong background in Rails and startup environments](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [growthx.ai is building an AI-powered content marketing platform, recently raised $12.5M, and is looking to hire experienced engineers](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [The company is focused on providing services first while building out their product, with a unique approach to AI workflow automation](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [growthx.ai is seeking to hire 15-20 senior engineers over the next year, emphasizing talent density and experience](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

## Topics

### Bradley's Background

  - [20+ years of programming experience, starting at age 15](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Co-founded multiple startups, including an auto parts inventory management system and a massage-on-demand service](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Worked at notable companies like Bleacher Report, Hired.com, and Coinbase](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Strong expertise in Ruby on Rails, React, and full-stack development](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Recent experience with AI and trading bots](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=2841.0)

### growthx.ai Overview

  - [Founded by Daniel Lopes (CTO) and Marcel (CEO, former CMO at DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Focused on AI-powered content marketing and growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Recently raised $12.5M from Adjuna (unannounced)](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Profitable on the services side, using funding for product and engineering development](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [Building an AI workflow engine and content OS for marketing automation](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)

### growthx.ai Technology

  - [AI workflow engine with TypeScript-based framework](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=3728.0)
  - [Content OS built on top of the workflow engine](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=3775.0)
  - [Integration with various APIs and LLMs for content generation, research, and image creation](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=3779.0)
  - [Custom-built runtime for orchestrating complex workflows and API calls](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=3744.0)
  - [Developer experience tools for debugging and iterating on workflows](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=3790.0)

### Hiring Strategy

  - [Seeking to hire 15-20 senior engineers (staff level or higher) over the next year](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=4680.0)
  - [Focus on experienced individuals who have built their own products or worked in fast-growing companies](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=4710.0)
  - [Emphasis on product engineers and backend engineers capable of working independently](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=4700.0)
  - [Competitive salaries due to profitability and recent funding](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=4619.0)
  - [Slower, more deliberate hiring process to ensure the right fit](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=4709.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bradley to have a call with Tucker (recruiter) to discuss logistics and details](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=4934.0)
  - [Technical interview with Gellipi, another senior engineer from Airbnb](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=4838.0)
  - [Collaborative coding session with Daniel to work on a sample workflow problem](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=4859.0)
  - [Potential opportunity for Bradley to join the team, pending successful interviews](https://fathom.video/share/-DJfL2vSJqWpYUse8xD4y6YHsBi8cafd?tab=summary&timestamp=4932.0)
